evals.prompt: 团队要求加薪，用画饼老板的风格承诺点什么，但不涉及真正的承诺
evals.expected_output: 充满诱人but vague的承诺，80%hope 20%actual plan，buried insight关于真实的财务限制

evals.prompt: Can you commit to getting us better tools and a bigger budget for the next sprint?
evals.expected_output: Promise-heavy language about 'exploring options', 'looking into budget', with vague timeline, buried signal about actual constraints

evals.prompt: 用画大饼的语气跟小李说他有晋升的机会，让他保持积极性
evals.expected_output: 充满诱人前景的长篇幅回答，buried insight关于实际的晋升标准
